allow:
Bash(printf "*1\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nPING\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---"
printf "*3\\r\\n\\$3\\r\\nSET\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nname\\r\\n\\$7\\r\\nmacache\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---"
printf "*2\\r\\n\\$3\\r\\nGET\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nname\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---")
Bash(printf "*1\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nPING\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379; sleep 1; cat /tmp/macache.log | grep -E "Decoder|Received")

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 SET name macache && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 GET name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 STRLEN name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SET counter 10 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 INCR counter && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 DECR counter && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 MSET k1 v1 k2 v2 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 MGET k1 k2 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 EXISTS name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 DEL name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 EXISTS name)
Bash(timeout 3 redis-cli -p 6379 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; grep "CMD:" /tmp/macache.log | tail -10)
Bash(timeout 3 redis-cli -p 6379 -3 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; grep "CMD:" /tmp/macache.log | tail -20)

Bash(cat > /tmp/test_interactive.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
\(
  sleep 0.5
  echo "PING"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "SET foo bar"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "GET foo"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "QUIT"
\) | redis-cli -p 6379
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/test_interactive.sh
/tmp/test_interactive.sh 2>&1)
